included: async status center and retry flow

release_phases.name: Internal Development Validation
release_phases.entry_condition: Stage 6 implementation begins from ready_for_stage_6 handoff.
release_phases.exit_condition: All Stage 6 tickets through TICKET-012 are merged with unit, integration, visual, and accessibility evidence.

release_phases.name: Release Candidate
release_phases.exit_condition: TICKET-014 release checklist is complete with no unresolved launch blockers.

release_phases.name: Private Beta
release_phases.entry_condition: Stage 7 deployment plan is approved and release candidate is deployed to a controlled beta environment.
release_phases.exit_condition: Target beta users can complete supplier import, pricing, bundle, and quote workflows without blocking defects.

release_phases.name: MVP Launch
release_phases.entry_condition: Private beta exit criteria are met and rollback plan is verified.
release_phases.exit_condition: MVP is available to intended launch users with monitoring, support intake, and incident response active.

release_gates.name: Automated Test Gate
release_gates.criteria: Unit, API integration, frontend interaction, and launch-critical E2E tests pass in CI or local equivalent.

release_gates.name: Security Gate
release_gates.criteria: Auth, RBAC, credential storage, quote sharing, and audit event flows pass security review.

release_gates.name: Accessibility And Visual Gate
release_gates.criteria: Stage 4 visual specs, responsive behavior, keyboard flow, and accessibility requirements are verified for launch-critical screens.

release_gates.name: Data Integrity Gate
release_gates.criteria: Import commits, pricing snapshots, margin calculations, generated quotes, and rollback scenarios preserve expected data integrity.

release_gates.name: Operational Readiness Gate
release_gates.criteria: Monitoring, worker retry visibility, support triage, backup/restore expectations, and release notes are prepared for Stage 7.

rollback_triggers: security exposure in quote share links
worker failure causing unrecoverable job states
rollback_actions: disable beta access through feature flags or workspace entitlement controls
pause import and quote generation workers
disable public quote share links if access control is affected
revert the release branch or deployment artifact
restore affected database state from the latest verified backup when required
notify impacted beta users and record incident notes

release_risks.risk: Supplier import correctness is launch-critical and likely to expose edge cases in customer data.
release_risks.mitigation: Limit MVP import formats, validate before commit, preserve raw import files, and provide recoverable failed states.

release_risks.risk: Pricing or margin errors can directly affect customer trust.
release_risks.mitigation: Use immutable pricing snapshots, visible cost breakdowns, and explicit test fixtures for high-risk calculation paths.

release_risks.risk: Quote sharing creates external access exposure.
release_risks.mitigation: Use scoped tokens, expiration controls, audit logs, and security review before beta release.
